MS_DRG_GRPR_VRSN_CD 
LABEL: 
MS-DRG Grouper Version Code 
DESCRIPTION: This field displays the Medicare-Severity Diagnosis Related Group (MS-DRG) Grouper version for the 
inpatient or skilled nursing facility (SNF) claim.
